title: Visual Novel Character Profile AI
sourceTitle: Visual Novel Character Profile AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Official visual novel character profile page for Mio Akiyama, built around a full standing character artwork, chibi illustration, expression variants, and readable profile data. Subject: Mio Akiyama is the hero character; A transfer student who maps abandoned stations after class. appears as the self-introduction copy, with Height 162 cm, Weight 48 kg, and Catchphrase "Every route has one hidden platform." shown as visible profile information. Scene: Clean game-website character page interface with a polished profile-card background, decorative UI panels, and a theme accent labeled strawberry pink. Composition: Fixed official gal-game profile layout: large full standing character artwork on one side, chibi version nearby, facial expression variants in smaller slots, profile data table, self-introduction quote block, and clean website-ready hierarchy. Signature Elements: Full standing character artwork, chibi illustration, expression variants, self-introduction block, name field, theme accent, height and weight fields, catchphrase, and official visual-novel website polish. Style: High-quality visual novel character page with CG-style illustrations, polished anime game UI, official character-site finish, crisp linework, soft gradients, and refined commercial presentation. Color Palette: Clean UI palette using strawberry pink as the visible character accent, balanced with white panels, soft neutral shadows, readable dark text, and subtle pastel gradients. Lighting: Soft character-illustration lighting with clean UI highlights, consistent expression thumbnails, and polished game-profile readability. Camera: Straight-on website profile composition with readable full standing art, chibi art, expression thumbnails, and profile text blocks. Typography: Display Mio Akiyama, A transfer student who maps abandoned stations after class., Height 162 cm, Weight 48 kg, and "Every route has one hidden platform." as intentional visible text; keep labels short and legible. Restrictions: Keep the transformed subject coherent, preserve the intended composition, maintain crisp visual detail, use clean readable text when present, and keep the background focused and uncluttered.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Official visual novel character profile page for Rena Hoshino, built around a full standing character artwork, chibi illustration, expression variants, and readable profile data. Subject: Rena Hoshino is the hero character; An energetic cafe drummer who solves rumors with rhythm. appears as the self-introduction copy, with Height 158 cm, Weight 46 kg, and Catchphrase "If the beat is right, I can be brave." shown as visible profile information. Scene: Clean game-website character page interface with a polished profile-card background, decorative UI panels, and a theme accent labeled misty blue. Composition: Fixed official gal-game profile layout: large full standing character artwork on one side, chibi version nearby, facial expression variants in smaller slots, profile data table, self-introduction quote block, and clean website-ready hierarchy. Restrictions: Keep the transformed subject coherent, preserve the intended composition, maintain crisp visual detail, use clean readable text when present, and keep the background focused and uncluttered.
